# Hytale Server SDK Reference v0.5.4

> Flat index of public SDK types by package. Each entry shows the class declaration (kind, extends, implements) so you can pick which file to read for full method signatures.

Source: `javap -protected` over the Hytale server jar. Excludes package-private classes and inner classes. FQCNs are shortened to leaf names for readability.

Regenerate per-package files + indexes: `node tools/sdk/extract-sdk-reference.js --full` (slow — see tools/sdk/README.md)
Regenerate indexes only:                  `node tools/sdk/build-sdk-llms-txt.js` + `node tools/sdk/build-sdk-method-index.js`
Search:                                   `node tools/sdk/sdk-search.js --method <name>`

## How to use this file

- Grep for the class name or interface you need: `grep ClassName llms.txt`
- The package heading above each match tells you which `.md` file to read for method signatures.
- Class entries are listed in jar/javap order within each package; packages in extractor order (lifecycle → commands → world → components → modules → npc → protocol).

## com.hypixel.hytale.assetstore.codec
[`com.hypixel.hytale.assetstore.codec.md`](./com.hypixel.hytale.assetstore.codec.md) (4)

- `AssetBuilderCodec` — class AssetBuilderCodec<K, T extends JsonAsset<K>> extends BuilderCodec<T> implements AssetCodec<K, T>
- `AssetCodec` — interface AssetCodec<K, T extends JsonAsset<K>> extends InheritCodec<T>, ValidatableCodec<T>
- `AssetCodecMapCodec` — class AssetCodecMapCodec<K, T extends JsonAsset<K>> extends StringCodecMapCodec<T, AssetBuilderCodec<K, T>> implements AssetCodec<K, T>
- `ContainedAssetCodec` — class ContainedAssetCodec<K, T extends JsonAssetWithMap<K, M>, M extends AssetMap<K, T>> implements Codec<K>, ValidatableCodec<K>

- `AssetsEvent` — abstract class AssetsEvent<K, T extends JsonAsset<K>> implements IEvent<Class<T>>

- `LoadedAssetsEvent` — class LoadedAssetsEvent<K, T extends JsonAsset<K>, M extends AssetMap<K, T>> extends AssetsEvent<K, T>
- `RegisterAssetStoreEvent` — class RegisterAssetStoreEvent extends AssetStoreEvent<Void>
- `RemoveAssetStoreEvent` — class RemoveAssetStoreEvent extends AssetStoreEvent<Void>
- `RemovedAssetsEvent` — class RemovedAssetsEvent<K, T extends JsonAsset<K>, M extends AssetMap<K, T>> extends AssetsEvent<K, T>
